## Checklist

- [ ] Component has `Readonly<>` props
- [ ] Tailwind classes use canonical syntax (`text-(--var)` not `text-[var(--var)]`)
- [ ] Test file added/updated (`src/__tests__/ComponentName.test.tsx`)
- [ ] Story file added/updated (`src/stories/ComponentName.stories.tsx`)
- [ ] Docs file added/updated (`docs/ComponentName.mdx`)
- [ ] Exported in `src/index.ts`
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
